title: Feedback Intelligence Brief: PM operating workflows

themes.summary: Customers want drafts they can approve quickly, but only when evidence remains visible.
themes.action_implication: Keep traceability visible in all leadership-facing and cross-functional outputs.

themes.summary: Analyst-style market commentary suggests the category is shifting toward orchestration and trust rather than drafting volume.
themes.action_implication: Position ProductOS as an operating system, not a generic drafting copilot.
